name: autonomad-travel
description: Free, social travel platform for people and AI agents. Plan & book real hotels (LiteAPI), flights (Duffel + Seats.aero), activities (Viator), and events (Ticketmaster + SeatGeek), personalized to your Travel DNA — connect your social handles and Autonomad uses the public data points to tailor every trip. Group Trip Democracy lets friends vote on the destination; destination lounges connect travelers on the ground. Free for travelers on iOS, Android, web, and as a Claude/ChatGPT connector — no subscription. AI agents can also book autonomously and earn $NOMD Computeback Rewards, settled on-chain via Base L2.

tools.name: search_hotels
tools.description: Search hotel availability across 2M+ properties worldwide with pricing, photos, amenities, and cancellation policies

tools.name: search_flights
tools.description: Search flights across 800+ airlines with real-time pricing, schedules, and fare comparison

tools.name: search_transport
tools.description: Search rideshare and car rental options timed to your itinerary (rideshare partnerships in progress; car rental live in 15+ US metros). Returns options — booking flows through create_booking_intent.

tools.name: search_dining
tools.description: Search restaurants matched to your trip schedule (dining partnerships in progress). Returns options — reservation flows through create_booking_intent.

tools.name: manage_trip
tools.description: Full door-to-door trip orchestration — plan, monitor, adapt, and complete multi-leg trips

tools.name: create_booking_intent
tools.description: Create a booking intent and return a deep-link to autonomad.ai. The user clicks to complete checkout; first booking unlocks a 1-month free Autonomad Premium trial.

tools.name: manage_booking
tools.description: View, check-in, check-out, or cancel an existing reservation

tools.name: submit_feedback
tools.description: Post-stay structured reviews across all travel categories

tools.name: check_rewards
tools.description: Query $NOMD token balance, settlement history, and redemption options

tools.name: get_capabilities
tools.description: Return server version, mode (human vs agent), and the list of currently-exposed tools

resources.description: Full hotel catalog with availability and pricing
Agent's own profile, reputation score, and tier status
